subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1914-06-30
subcodes.first_line: I am serving God. I am the servant of God. I give sight to the blind, hearing to the deaf
subcodes.subjects: @station; mission; authority of Abdu'l-Baha, @mission of the Manifestation of God in the world, @power of the Manifestation of God, @living waters; water of life, @light and darkness
